mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FILES ( FILE_NUM , FILE_GROUP_ID , OBFUSCATE_NAME , DISPLAY_NAME , EXTEND_NAME , FILE_LENGTH , FILE_PATH) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(FILE_NUM), 0) + 1 FROM FILES WHERE FILE_GROUP_ID = #{fileGroupId}) , #{fileGroupId} , #{obfuscateName} , #{displayName} , #{extendName} , #{fileLength} , #{filePath})
mapper.select: SELECT DISPLAY_NAME , EXTEND_NAME , FILE_LENGTH , FILE_PATH FROM FILES WHERE FILE_GROUP_ID = #{_parameter}
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'FG-'|| TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD-') || LPAD(SEQ_FILES_GROUP_PK.NEXTVAL, 6, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO FILES_GROUP (FILE_GROUP_ID) VALUES (#{fileGroupId})
